headline: Boston Scientific (BSX) Says CHAMPION-AF Trial Meets All Primary Endpoints
summary: Boston Scientific Corporation (NYSE:BSX) is one of the 10 Best 52-Week Low NYSE Stocks to Buy Now. On March 29, 2026, Boston Scientific Corporation (NYSE:BSX) announced that its CHAMPION-AF clinical trial met all primary and secondary safety and efficacy endpoints. The study evaluated the WATCHMAN FLX device versus NOACs for stroke risk reduction in patients […]
